name: nowdoing
title: NowDoing
description: Start, stop, and log time in the NowDoing macOS app from Raycast — start activities, stop tracking, log entries, and check today's status without opening the menu bar popover.
author: nowdoing

commands.name: start-activity
commands.title: Start Activity
commands.subtitle: NowDoing
commands.description: Search NowDoing activities and start tracking one (create-if-missing supported).

commands.name: stop-tracking
commands.title: Stop Tracking
commands.subtitle: NowDoing
commands.description: Stop the currently tracked NowDoing activity.

commands.name: log-entry
commands.title: Log Entry
commands.subtitle: NowDoing
commands.description: Log a fixed-duration time entry against a NowDoing activity.

commands.name: status
commands.title: Status / Today
commands.subtitle: NowDoing
commands.description: Show the current NowDoing tracking state and today's total.
